code: import{createSlice}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';var initialState={messageActive:true,myItemsActive:false,myProfileActive:false,myShippingActive:false,settingsActive:false};var messageSlice=createSlice({name:'message',initialState:initialState,reducers:{setSidebarCategoryActive:function setSidebarCategoryActive(state,action){state[action.payload[0]]=true;state[action.payload[1]]=false;state[action.payload[2]]=false;state[action.payload[3]]=false;state[action.payload[4]]=false;}}});var setSidebarCategoryActive=messageSlice.actions.setSidebarCategoryActive;export{setSidebarCategoryActive};export var messageSelector=function messageSelector(state){return state.message;};export default messageSlice.reducer;
